_meta.scope: pilot — personas 10/12/15 (distinct voice targets: cold-female / bright-female / deep-male)
_meta.purpose: Validate voice corpus pipeline end-to-end BEFORE scaling to 10 personas; produce evidence for 1차 v2.0 RC stub→real replacement

tool_errors.ffmpeg_fail: none — loudnorm+silenceremove filter chain ran clean
tool_errors.rclone_auth: none — r2: remote accepted upload (1.8s, 2.47 MiB/s)

per_persona.name: ice_queen
per_persona.reason: 0 CC hits across 3 queries; all K-drama top hits copyrighted

per_persona.name: pure_heroine
per_persona.reason: 1 CC hit captured (book narration) — archetype match is partial; 90% of target duration still missing

per_persona.name: charismatic_prez
per_persona.reason: 0 CC hits for deep-male authoritative archetype — rarest CC category

root_cause.headline: CC-licensed Korean voice content on YouTube is effectively a drought
evidence: Across 9 queries (3 per persona), only 1 result was Creative Commons licensed
All 3 deep-male queries returned 0 CC hits
All K-drama/웹툰 search results are copyrighted commercial content (SBS/tvN/JTBC/KBS)

path_forward_remaining_7_personas.tier1_scale_verdict: NOT_VIABLE — tier1 (CC harvest) cannot meet corpus targets at scale; pilot proves the drought
path_forward_remaining_7_personas.tier2_fair_use_decision_point: User must authorize fair-use ≤3min educational excerpts from copyrighted K-dramas (plan's own tier2) — unblocks archetype-matching clips but introduces copyright risk
path_forward_remaining_7_personas.tier3_user_recording: 30min × 10 personas = 5h of recording — feasible but requires user time, ChatML prompt sheets per archetype needed

tier4_tts_unlock.blocker: .py ban — Naver Clova / Google TTS SDKs are Python
tier4_tts_unlock.hexa_native_unlock: build hexa-native HTTP client POST to Clova REST endpoint — ~1day eng
tier4_tts_unlock.macos_say_alternative: macOS `say` supports ko Yuna/Minsu voices — callable via hexa exec() with zero deps, available NOW
tier4_tts_unlock.recommended: macOS `say` for immediate tier4 bootstrap; Clova upgrade later for production quality

recommended_sequence: 1. Bootstrap all 10 personas with macOS `say` TTS (zero-cost, zero-license-risk) — unblocks v2.0 RC
2. Supplement persona_12 with the harvested CC narration clip (already uploaded)
3. Collect user-recorded samples for top-3 archetypes (10/12/15) during next session
4. If fair-use tier2 authorized, run targeted ytsearch with --download-sections '*0-180' on curated URL list (user-provided)

v2_0_rc_unblock.recommended_unblock_move: pivot to macOS `say` TTS (tier4_alt) — all 10 personas voiced in hours not days, stub→real replaced
v2_0_rc_unblock.quality_tradeoff: macOS ko voices are competent baseline; real-voice vocoder conditioning can replace post-RC
decision_required_from_user: A. approve macOS `say` tier4_alt bootstrap → unblock v2.0 RC this session
B. authorize tier2 fair-use K-drama excerpts → higher-quality but copyright-gray
C. user recording session → highest quality, longest time (5h user commitment)
